_note: Craft of Exile is third-party and not affiliated with GGG. Weights/odds are estimates. Simulation is out of scope.
league_label_conflict: Craft of Exile labels the league 'Return of the Ancients' but the official trade2 API lists 'Runes of Aldur' as the current league (verified 2026-07-05). Treat labels separately.
